message:
feat(demo-showcase): latency tracking, capability overrides, and test stability

app.rs: Replace inline json_escape() with improved escape_json() handling
backslash, newline, carriage return, tab, and control chars via \uXXXX.
Create parent directories before writing JSONL reports to prevent failures
with non-existent paths.

command_palette_lab.rs: Add latency tracking to BenchState — measure
set_query() duration, display color-coded latency (green <1ms, red >1ms)
in the bench panel. Add 16 unit tests covering default construction, filter
mode cycling/labels/roundtrip, evidence score ordering and ledger
completeness, bench state operations, and render panic-safety.

mouse_playground.rs: Add #[serial] annotations to 4 tests using shared
global counters (event_counter, diagnostics_flag) to fix race conditions
in parallel test execution.

terminal_capabilities.rs: Add detected_caps_override field with setter and
getter that checks the override before falling back to profile-based
detection, enabling test injection of capabilities.

visual_effects.rs: Change markdown_panel from Text to Paragraph<'static>
with WrapMode::Word at construction, avoiding per-frame allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
